mapper.update: UPDATE CREDIT_CARD_APPLICATIONS SET version_id = #{versionId}, payment_snapshot = #{paymentSnapshot}, card_password_hash = #{cardPasswordHash}, requested_limit = #{requestedLimit}, application_status = 'REQUESTED', applied_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE credit_app_id = #{creditAppId}
mapper.select: SELECT version_id FROM CARD_VERSIONS WHERE card_id = #{cardId} AND version_status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY published_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM ( SELECT paid_year, paid_month FROM CARD_TRANSACTIONS ct JOIN USER_CARDS uc ON ct.user_card_id = uc.user_card_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND ct.status = 'APPROVED' AND ct.paid_at >= SYSTIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '3' YEAR GROUP BY paid_year, paid_month HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE CREDIT_CARD_APPLICATIONS SET screening_result = #{screeningResult}, doc_verified_yn = #{docVerifiedYn}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy},
rejection_reason = #{rejectionReason},
application_status = 'REJECTED',
updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE credit_app_id = #{creditAppId}
mapper.select: SELECT ROUND(AVG(monthly_amount) / 0.35) FROM ( SELECT paid_year, paid_month, SUM(ct.amount) AS monthly_amount FROM CARD_TRANSACTIONS ct JOIN USER_CARDS uc ON ct.user_card_id = uc.user_card_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND ct.status = 'APPROVED' AND ct.paid_at >= SYSTIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '3' YEAR GROUP BY paid_year, paid_month )
mapper.update:
UPDATE CREDIT_CARD_APPLICATIONS SET estimated_monthly_income = #{estimatedMonthlyIncome}, limit_check_result = #{limitCheckResult},
approved_limit = #{approvedLimit}, application_status = 'APPROVED',
application_status = 'REVIEWING',
updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE credit_app_id = #{creditAppId}

UPDATE CREDIT_CARD_APPLICATIONS SET application_status = #{applicationStatus}, reviewed_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy},
approved_limit = #{approvedLimit},
rejection_reason = #{rejectionReason},
updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE credit_app_id = #{creditAppId}
UPDATE CREDIT_CARD_APPLICATIONS SET application_status = #{applicationStatus}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE credit_app_id = #{creditAppId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM CREDIT_CARD_APPLICATIONS WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND application_status != 'DRAFT' ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT credit_app_id FROM CREDIT_CARD_APPLICATIONS WHERE application_status = 'DRAFT' AND created_at < SYSTIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY
